briefing: Markets posted a moderate risk-on session with NASDAQ +0.9% and S&P 500 +0.6% — positive but below the strong +2% NASDAQ threshold from strategy memory. With $677 in cash and four open slots, deploying into DSC is the right call per the portfolio rule to fill slots when cash exceeds $500. DSC is the top-ranked candidate with all four momentum signals aligned, making it the highest-conviction entry available today.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means requiring several independent technical indicators to agree before entering a trade — for example, RSI in the bullish zone, a MACD crossover, rising histogram, and price above the 20-day moving average all at once. Any one signal alone can be a false positive; when multiple unrelated signals point the same direction simultaneously, the probability of a real momentum move increases significantly. DSC today hit all four criteria, which is why it earns a high-conviction rating.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重信號確認是指要求多個獨立技術指標同時發出看漲訊號，才決定入場，例如RSI處於多頭動能區間、MACD出現黃金交叉、直方圖上升，以及股價站上20日均線需同步成立。單一指標容易出現假信號；當多個不相關的指標同時指向同一方向，動能行情的可信度便大幅提升。DSC今日四項指標全數達標，因此獲得高信念評級。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest broad-based gains on July 6th, with the NASDAQ outpacing the S&P 500 in a risk-on session. Technology and growth-oriented sectors led, reflecting continued investor appetite for momentum names following recent cooling in rate-hike fears. The moderate magnitude of the move (+0.9% NASDAQ) suggests measured optimism rather than euphoria — a healthy environment for selective momentum entries.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市7月6日錄得溫和普漲，那斯達克指數表現領先標普500，市場呈現風險偏好情緒。科技及成長股板塊引領升勢，反映投資者在聯準會加息預期降溫後持續追捧動能股。那斯達克漲幅0.9%屬於溫和上揚，顯示市場情緒樂觀但未至亢奮，為精選動能股入場提供良好窗口。

trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four multi-signal confirmation criteria met — RSI in bullish momentum zone (59.2), MACD crossover, histogram rising (institutional participation signal), and price above SMA-20 — making it the strongest technical setup in today's screener on a risk-on day with $677 cash available.
